title: acetosella pentantha
side_effects: Acetosella pentantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's compounds may also cause allergic reactions, resulting in skin irritation, rashes, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to liver and kidney damage due to its toxic properties. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Acetosella pentantha for medicinal purposes.
